description: Download or ingest videos from X/Twitter, YouTube, other yt-dlp-supported pages, direct media URLs, or local files and rapidly turn them into no-header vertical social clips with centered preserved landscape footage, dark source blur, word-timed captions, direct FFmpeg rendering, and actual-export QA.
triggers: make a vertical captioned clip from this x video
turn this twitter video into a tiktok style video
make a no-header vertical clip from this video
create a 9:16 social cut with captions
download online video and make vertical social clip
youtube video to captioned vertical clip
local video to vertical social cut
name: Video to Vertical Social Cut
